# Checklist: API Quality
<!-- Generated by /speckit.checklist -->
<!-- Branch: main | Date: 2026-04-06 -->
<!-- Updated: 2026-04-06 — all items resolved -->

## Existing Endpoints

| ID | Check | Dimension | FR/US Ref | Status |
|----|-------|-----------|-----------|--------|
| CHK021 | POST /user: No backend length validation on username/nickname/password. Frontend enforces password min 8 (FR-028). This is existing behavior — acceptable for a 2-user personal app. No change planned. | [validation] | US1, FR-021, FR-028 | [x] |
| CHK022 | POST /group/{id}/transaction: u32 prevents negatives but allows 0. Added FR-032: amount must be > 0, zero-amount transactions should be rejected. | [validation] | US6, FR-001, FR-032 | [x] |
| CHK023 | All endpoints return bare HTTP status codes without error bodies. This is the existing convention. No change planned — keeps API simple for 2-user app. | [errors] | All US | [x] |
| CHK024 | POST /group/{id}/member: returns 400 (BadRequest) if user already a member. Documented in FR-004 update. | [contract] | US5, FR-004 | [x] |

## New Endpoints

| ID | Check | Dimension | FR/US Ref | Status |
|----|-------|-----------|-----------|--------|
| CHK025 | PUT /group/{id}/transaction/{txId}: Full replacement — all fields required (amount, description, debtor_ids, optional timestamp). Specified in FR-025. | [contract] | CLR-003, FR-025 | [x] |
| CHK026 | PUT /group/{id}/transaction/{txId}: Response returns updated Transaction (not Group). This is the most natural response for a PUT on a transaction resource. Create returns Group for historical reasons; update follows REST conventions. | [consistency] | CLR-003, FR-025 | [x] |
| CHK027 | DELETE /group/{id}: Returns 404 for non-owner. Matches existing pattern (delete_transaction returns 404 for non-creditor). Specified in FR-026. | [consistency] | CLR-004, FR-026 | [x] |
| CHK028 | PUT /user: Returns FullUser (with groups). Matches GET /user response. Frontend can update context directly. Specified in FR-027. | [contract] | CLR-005, FR-027 | [x] |
| CHK029 | PUT /user: nickname required, non-empty. Rocket's JSON deserialization will reject missing fields. Empty string check should be added in service layer. Specified in FR-027. | [validation] | CLR-005, FR-027 | [x] |
| CHK030 | PUT /user: password field is `Option<String>`. If omitted (None) or empty string (""), leave unchanged. Specified in FR-027. | [validation] | CLR-005, FR-027 | [x] |
| CHK031 | T032 and T035 cover openapi.yaml updates for all 3 new endpoints. Must verify schemas match implementation post-build. | [contract] | CLR-003, CLR-004, CLR-005 | [x] |
